headline: Here Are Wednesday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: CrowdStrike, Harley-Davidson, Intuitive Surgical, Medline, Nike, Oracle, Planet Fitness, Vici Properties, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading flat as we hit the mid-point of the trading week, and while we didn’t see the snapback rally that was the star of the show Monday, at least all four major indices held their own as the conflict in Iran grinds on. headline: Mizuho Downgrades VICI Properties to Neutral, Maintains Price Target to $30
summary: Mizuho  analyst Haendel St. Juste   downgrades VICI Properties (NYSE:VICI) from Outperform to Neutral and maintains the price target from $30 to $30.
